name: Clarence Paul
abstract: Clarence Otto Pauling (March 19, 1928 – May 6, 1995) better known and published as Clarence Paul, was an American songwriter and record producer who was best known for his career with Detroit's Motown Records.

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Dawson
about_quotes.evidence: He had, uh, Joe Welsh on a drum. He had a fella called, uh, Clarence Paul on the saxophone. ... That was Hippolyte Charles.
